channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gov. Whitmer Donor Charged in $20 Million Fraud Scheme
item.description: A longtime donor to Michigan Democrat Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has been charged with 16 felonies for allegedly misusing $20 million of state funds. Michi...

item.title: ABC Defends 'The View' in FCC Fight Over Equal-Time Rules
item.description: ABC and its Houston affiliate asked the Federal Communications Commission on Thursday to reaffirm that "The View" qualifies as a bona fide news interv...

item.title: Ramaswamy Faces Racist Smears in Ohio Gov. Race
item.description: Vivek Ramaswamy, who built his political profile by criticizing Democrats for their focus on race, is now confronting racist attacks from some conserv...

item.title: Almost 600 Prop 50 Ballots Were Never Counted. Now California Could Destroy Them.
